case_title: OLLIE RUTH DACUS VS. TERRY ELLIOTT

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OLLIE RUTH DACUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JONATHAN POLLAND; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DACUS, OLLIE RUTH
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DACUS, OLLIE RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, TERRY (REVEREND): MOUNT ZION BAPTIST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DACUS, OLLIE RUTH AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, TERRY (REVEREND): MOUNT ZION BAPTIST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED MAY-02-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIOTT, TERRY (REVEREND): MOUNT ZION BAPTIST

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
